pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will target Java 17 bytecode instead of Java 21, failing to utilize new language features or meeting JDK 21 baseline requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to replace javax.annotation removed in Java 11+ and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails if code uses @Generated or other javax.annotation classes which are no longer on the classpath in Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito version to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions often fail at runtime or compile time on Java 21 due to internal reflection restrictions or bytecode generation issues.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to fork JVMs or execute tests correctly on Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not support the 'release' flag or Java 21 compilation correctly.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or report coverage for classes compiled with Java 21.
